observation: Shipped creator-prompt-dna-qa-route: standardized browser DOM QA evidence for prompt DNA adapter surface. Closes post-check-coverage gap (11/11 surfaces covered). 26 retained routes. Selected creator-surface-dark-mode-route. Added creator-measure-print-cache-route.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, keep scripts and docs in sync, reduce noise in regression output, catch orphan files, uncovered check gaps, missing QA evidence, performance regressions, and dark mode accessibility

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report — improving autonomous Darwin signal-to-noise ratio.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-filter.ts that wraps the regression orchestrator, filters out known pre-existing bun-types lint errors from output, and reports only actionable failures
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean, no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise into TypeScript compilation output during bun run.

candidates.mutation: Add a dark mode toggle to all creator surfaces (CSS custom properties + data-theme attribute switch). Industrial-brutalist aesthetic should support a dark variant with inverted paper texture, dimmed matrix scanline, and adjusted signal accent colors — preserving the aesthetic while improving creator comfort during late-night sessions.
candidates.phenotype: Global dark mode CSS + toggle button on each creator surface. All 11 surfaces support data-theme='dark' without breaking measure:check or print:render. Machine check validates dark mode CSS custom properties are present and no overflow occurs in dark mode.
candidates.risk: Must not break measure:check or print:render in dark mode. Complex surface touch — needs per-surface verification. Industrial-brutalist dark palette requires taste-verified color choices.

candidates.mutation: Add SHA-256 content-hash caching to measure:check and print:render to skip redundant browser launches for unchanged HTML files.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-measure-print-cache.ts wrapping measure/print with cache keyed by SHA-256 of source HTML, --no-cache force flag.
candidates.risk: Must not break measure/print output format. Cache files gitignored. SHA-256 guard prevents stale results.
